evotorch.reason: load-bearing isolated capability probe for SNES-based evolutionary optimization

capability_summary.can: SNES drives a 4D sphere objective below 0.5 within 50 generations at popsize=20 on CPU tensors; raises on negative popsize at run time and survives a zero-generation run.
capability_summary.cannot: Does not by itself pick a step-size schedule; stdev_init must be chosen problem-aware or convergence stalls.
